business.name: Orelix
business.description: Orelix builds intelligent AI employees that automate repetitive work, support your team, and integrate seamlessly with your existing business processes.

contact.sectionLead: Tell us about your business and workflows. We'll identify where AI employees can deliver the highest ROI — and get back to you within one business day.

hero.titleLine2: Scale your business, not your workload.
hero.lead: Custom AI employees that automate repetitive work and plug into the systems you already use.

vision.titlePrefix: The future of every business is
vision.intro: We are entering an era where growth no longer depends on hiring more people for every repetitive task. The most ambitious companies will combine human judgment with a digital workforce that never sleeps — trained on their standards, connected to their tools, accountable to their goals.
manifesto: Tomorrow's companies won't only hire people.
Not to replace humans — to remove the work that buries them.
To accelerate growth without burning out the teams that make it possible.
To free people for creativity, strategy, relationships, and the decisions only they can make.

sections.title: A workforce, not a widget
sections.body: We don't believe in generic chatbots bolted onto broken processes. Orelix builds digital employees — roles with responsibilities, context, and standards. They show up in your workflows the way a trained colleague would: consistent, reliable, and aligned with how your business actually runs.

sections.title: Technology that stays in the background
sections.body: The best systems disappear into the work. Our vision is a world where AI isn't a buzzword on a slide deck — it's the quiet infrastructure that keeps operations moving while your people do what humans do best. Invisible when it's working. Indispensable when you need it.

sections.title: From implementation partner to platform
sections.body: Today we design custom AI employees for real businesses in the real economy. Tomorrow we imagine a platform where every organization can compose, deploy, and evolve its digital workforce — securely, measurably, and at scale. That long arc guides every decision we make.

principles: Measurable value — if it doesn't save time, cut cost, or grow revenue, we don't build it.
Human oversight — automation with accountability, not automation for its own sake.
Your stack, your rules — integration over rip-and-replace, every time.
Trust by design — enterprise-grade security for every deployment.
vision.closing: At Orelix, we're not waiting for that future. We're building it — one digital employee at a time, for teams that refuse to choose between growth and sanity.
vision.closingLine: This is what we mean by Building Your Digital Workforce.

whatWeDo.title: We build AI Employees.
whatWeDo.closing: Instead of hiring another employee for repetitive work, we build AI employees that perform these tasks autonomously and integrate with your existing software.

services.lead: Purpose-built roles that work alongside your team — connected to the tools you already use.
services.outroLead: From discovery to deployment — custom AI employees tailored to how your business actually runs.

howWeWork.lead: A proven process — from understanding your operations to deploying and optimizing your AI workforce.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: We identify opportunities where AI delivers the highest ROI.

steps.title: Build
steps.description: We create custom AI employees tailored to your business.

steps.title: Deploy
steps.description: We integrate everything into your existing systems.

steps.title: Improve
steps.description: We continuously optimize your AI workforce.

industries.lead: Initially focused on industries where repetitive work slows growth the most.
industries.security: Secure cloud infrastructure — enterprise-grade security for every deployment.

cta.title: Let's build your digital workforce.
cta.lead: Book a discovery call and we'll identify where AI employees deliver the highest ROI for your business.

home.visionTeaser: Tomorrow's companies won't only hire people — they'll build a hybrid workforce of humans and digital employees working side by side.

vision.title: Our vision
vision.description: The future of every business is hybrid. Orelix is building the digital workforce — AI employees that work alongside your team.

howWeWork.title: How we work
howWeWork.description: Discover, design, build, deploy, and improve — how Orelix delivers custom AI employees for your business.

services.title: Services
services.description: AI receptionists, sales employees, office assistants, customer support, and workflow automation — built for your business.
services.heroLead: Purpose-built roles that work alongside your team — connected to the tools you already use.

about.title: About
about.description: Orelix builds the digital workforce of tomorrow. Our vision, values, and how we work with every client.
about.heroLead: We don't sell AI — we solve business problems with measurable outcomes.

industries.title: Industries
industries.description: Orelix serves construction, HVAC, solar, real estate, accounting, manufacturing, logistics, and professional services.
industries.heroLead: Industries where repetitive work slows growth the most — and where AI employees make the biggest impact.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Book a discovery call with Orelix. Tell us about your workflows and we'll show you where AI employees fit.
contact.heroLead: Tell us about your business and workflows. We'll get back to you within one business day.
